settings.text: 88 Vine Street, Brooklyn, NY 11201. No reservations needed — just walk in. We're open Wednesday through Monday from 5 PM.

settings.title: Hours
settings.text:
Wed — Fri: 5 PM – 12 AM
Sat: 4 PM – 1 AM
Sun: 4 PM – 10 PM
Mon — Tue: Closed

settings.question: Do you take reservations?
settings.answer: No — we're walk-in only. Most evenings you can find a spot at the bar or a table without waiting. Friday and Saturday nights can get busy after 9 PM, so come earlier if you want to be sure.

settings.question: Can I buy bottles to take home?
settings.answer: Yes! We have a small retail shelf near the entrance with a rotating selection of natural wines. Ask the staff for recommendations — they'll help you find something based on what you enjoyed at the bar.

settings.question: Do you serve food?
settings.answer: We serve small plates from our kitchen — think charcuterie, cheese, marinated olives, grilled halloumi, sardines on toast. Designed to share and to pair with what you're drinking. Kitchen is open until an hour before close.

settings.question: Is there live music?
settings.answer: Every Friday is Live Vinyl night — DJs spinning records from 8 PM. We also host occasional live sets and wine events. Check our Events page or follow us on Instagram for announcements.
